name: io.github.nikitacometa/mnemon-mcp
description: Persistent layered memory for AI agents — 4-layer model (episodic, semantic, procedural, resource) with SQLite FTS5, Snowball stemming (EN+RU), fact versioning via superseding chains. Zero-cloud, single-file database.

environment_variables.name: MNEMON_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER
environment_variables.description: Embedding provider for vector search: 'openai' or 'ollama' (default: disabled)

environment_variables.name: MNEMON_EMBEDDING_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: API key for embedding provider (required for OpenAI)

tools.name: memory_add
tools.description: Store a memory with layer, entity, confidence, importance, and optional TTL

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Full-text or exact search with filters by layer, entity, date, scope, confidence

tools.name: memory_update
tools.description: Update in-place or create a versioned replacement (superseding chain)

tools.name: memory_delete
tools.description: Delete a memory; re-activates predecessor if part of a superseding chain

tools.name: memory_inspect
tools.description: Get layer statistics or trace a single memory's version history

tools.name: memory_export
tools.description: Export to JSON, Markdown, or Claude-md format with filters

tools.name: memory_health
tools.description: Run diagnostics and optionally garbage-collect expired entries
